result.vlm_summary:
page_state:
Google Flights results page for Sydney → Los Angeles, showing “All flights” sorted by price. A list of flight options is visible with prices and basic itinerary details.
task_relevant_visible_text:
“All flights”; “Prices include required taxes + fees for 1 adult. Optional charges and bag fees may apply.”; “Sorted by price”; visible options include “2:00 PM – 1:00 PM Fiji Airways $350”, “6:20 AM – 1:00 PM $443”, “9:55 AM – 11:40 AM Air New Zealand $539”, “11:45 AM – 11:40 AM Air New Zealand $540”, “11:20 AM – 7:05 AM American · Qantas $541”, “5:45 PM – 1:30 PM Qantas · American $541”.
selected_candidate:
The lowest-priced visible one-way flight: Fiji Airways, 2:00 PM – 1:00 PM, 1 stop, SYD–LAX, $350.
constraint_evidence:
- Sydney departure: supported (URL/title show Sydney to Los Angeles; SYD–LAX visible).
- Los Angeles arrival: supported (URL/title show Sydney to Los Angeles; SYD–LAX visible).
- One-way flight: supported (Google Flights results page for a single route; no return leg shown in visible results).
- Departing on March 10, 2026: supported (URL contains 2026-03-10).
- Lowest-priced: supported (page sorted by price; $350 is the lowest visible price).
- Flight result must be a flight: supported (all visible items are flight itineraries).
- Specific airline/itinerary details: supported for selected candidate (Fiji Airways, 1 stop, times visible).
- Nonstop requirement: not_visible (not part of task).
- Exact baggage/fees/rating/amenities: not_visible.
actio

evidence.claim: Final page shows Google Flights results for Sydney → Los Angeles with flights sorted by price and visible options listed.
The selected candidate on the final page is the lowest-priced visible one-way flight: Fiji Airways, 2:00 PM – 1:00 PM, 1 stop, $350.
Constraint evidence indicates Sydney departure, Los Angeles arrival, one-way routing, March 10 2026 departure, and price sorting are all supported on the final results page.
The trajectory ends on the results page after a final exit message, with no concrete contradiction or unresolved state visible in the trace.
